<!--
Thanks for contributing to TwigcnBundle!

Please keep this PR focused on a single logical change. If you are
adding a new component, see CONTRIBUTING.md for the recommended layout.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / new component (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing usage to break)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests cover the change (PHPUnit and/or Vitest as applicable).
- [ ] `ddev composer -d packages/bundle qa` passes locally.
- [ ] `ddev npm run typecheck && ddev npm test` passes locally.
- [ ] [`CHANGELOG.md`](../CHANGELOG.md) has an entry under `[Unreleased]`
      in the appropriate section (Added / Changed / Deprecated /
      Removed / Fixed / Security).
- [ ] Public API changes (PHP signatures, Twig component props,
      controller names, exported modules) are clearly noted in the
      summary above.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific the reviewer should look at, or context they
     need to evaluate the change? -->
